text.title: Project Integration Management Failure Modes
text.summary: 3 antipatterns observed in real deployments. Each pairs a symptom (observable signal) with root cause and concrete fix.

antipattern.symptom: Overall RAG = green while two areas = red.
Scope cut by CR but schedule baseline still original.
antipattern.root-cause: CR approval not reflected in all baselines
antipattern.fix: Update all impacted baselines after each CR.
